mapper.select: /* userInfoMgmtMapper.userInfoLmsSendList */ SELECT A.USERID AS USERID , A.MOBILE_NO AS MOBILE_NO , A.RESULT_YN , TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM,'YYYYMM') AS REGST_DTTM FROM CMN_WEBUSER_CAN_MST A , MCP_USER@DL_MCP B WHERE A.USERID = B.USERID AND A.NAME <> '삭제' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.SYS_LDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYYMMDD') <= TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -11)),'YYYYMMDD') AND A.RESULT_YN = 'N' AND USER_DIVISION = '00' AND MSEQ IS NULL AND ROWNUM < 301
SELECT SMS_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS mseq FROM DUAL
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(#{requestTime}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) AS requestTime FROM DUAL
/* userInfoMgmtMapper.insertMsgQueue */ INSERT INTO MSG_QUEUE ( MSEQ /* Sequence */ ,MSG_TYPE /* 1:SMS 2:SMS URL 3:MMS 4:MMS URL */ ,DSTADDR /* 수신자 번호 */ ,CALLBACK /* 발신자 번호 */ ,SUBJECT /* 제목 */ ,TEXT /* 전송메시지 */ ,EXPIRETIME /* 유효시간 */ ,REQUEST_TIME /* 발송요청시간 */ ,OPT_ID /* SMS TEMPLATE ID */ ) SELECT #{mseq} ,MSG_TYPE ,#{mobileNo} ,CALLBACK ,NVL( #{subject}, SUBJECT ) ,NVL( #{sendMessage}, TEXT ) ,EXPIRE_HOUR * 60 * 60 ,TO_DATE(#{requestTime}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,#{templateId} FROM MSP_SMS_TEMPLATE_MST WHERE TEMPLATE_ID = #{templateId}
mapper.select: /* userInfoMgmtMapper.userInfoLmsSendList2 */ SELECT A.USERID AS USERID , A.MOBILE_NO AS MOBILE_NO , A.RESULT_YN , A.SEND_YN , A.MSEQ FROM CMN_WEBUSER_CAN_MST A , MCP_USER@DL_MCP B WHERE A.USERID = B.USERID AND A.NAME <> '삭제' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.SYS_LDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYYMMDD') <= TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -11)),'YYYYMMDD') AND USER_DIVISION = '00' AND A.SEND_YN = 'N' AND MSEQ IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE CMN_WEBUSER_CAN_MST SET SEND_YN = 'Y' , SEND_RSN_CD = (SELECT RESULT FROM MSG_RESULT WHERE MSEQ = #{mseq}) , RVISN_ID = 'BATCH' , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE MSEQ = #{mseq}
